name: Linguini
recipeIngredient: 1/2 large Head Cauliflower, broken into florets
1/4 cup Grated Parmesan Cheese or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain linguini well and return it to the cooking pan.
2. Add cream and butter to the pan. Stir until melted and hot.
3. Season with salt and pepper. If desired, add zucchini-cauliflower-parmesan mix.
4. Zucchini-Cauliflower Parmesan:
a. Place zucchini slices and cauliflower in a 2-quart casserole.
b. Add chicken broth, salt, and pepper.
c. Cover and microwave on high for 8 minutes or until desired tenderness, stirring once.
d. Sprinkle with parmesan and toss to mix. Add a little more cheese and/or cream if desired.
Recipe By:
